NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF HEARING ON APPEAL
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM AND ORDER
PRO TEM JUDGE DENNIS BIRKHIMER;CLERK JUN P.PANELO; ALL PARTIES PRESENT. JUDGMENT WAS RENDERED IN FAVOR OF THE RESPONDENTS-PLAINTIFFS, LARA A. HUTNER AND GREG A. WHITING.
